summary: Preflight found pytest command and tests passed.
details: Ran python -m pytest tests/test_core.py. It passed. The project requires PYTHONPATH=src before pytest.

memory_nodes.title: Project pytest setup rule
memory_nodes.content: For this repository, run PYTHONPATH=src python -m pytest. Without PYTHONPATH=src imports can fail. Evidence is in verifier.log and stdout.log.
